TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Cubus = Beyhing bay qhuni mi mtuting wasaw na ka cubus nii, sqmusu qhuni na msama mi msdhriq, wasaw na mrux kingal, kiya ka ssiyaw wasaw na niqan ini pwaya elu krtan rupung, hnytuwan so qapan bawa ka wasaw na, niqan 5 hbin, mdakil ddwiyaq. Cubus nii u mniq brah mtuting wasaw ciida, kiya ka wasaw na brah ptingan mrriyux mcays, brhibung banah mi dhuq mbanah, nduwa bay malu qtaan, kaya ka niaqn bay hangan na mbanah wasaw ka cubus nii, wada dha phmaan qqtaan da, knmalu bay phmaan qhuni, hmaan ddaun elu, phmaan kulu phpah mi phmaan dxral, saya daw, hbaraw bay ka ita sediq ngalan na pusu sqmusu, ltudan na pprana kluwan anay cubus. Ini dha eqraqun ddiyu ka cubus nii, wana duma ita sediq ngalan dha phmaan ngiraw ka sqmusu cubus, uxay uri u ngalan dha mtahu puniq.
S.PHON: = ʦubus = bəħiŋ baj qħuni mi mtutiŋ wasaw na ka ʦubus nii, sqmusu qħuni na msama mi msdħɾiq, wasaw na mɾux kiŋal, kija ka ssijaw wasaw na niqan ini pwaja əlu kɾtan ɾupuŋ, ħnjtuwan so qapan bawa ka wasaw na, niqan * ħbin, mdakil ddwijaq. ʦubus nii u mniq bɾaħ mtutiŋ wasaw ʦiida, kija ka wasaw na bɾaħ ptiŋan mɾɾijux mʦajs, bɾħibuŋ banaħ mi dħuq mbanaħ, nduwa baj malu qtaan, kaja ka niaqn baj ħaŋan na mbanaħ wasaw ka ʦubus nii, wada dħa pħmaan qqtaan da, knmalu baj pħmaan qħuni, ħmaan ddaun əlu, pħmaan kulu pħpaħ mi pħmaan dxɾal, saja daw, ħbaɾaw baj ka ita sədiq ŋalan na pusu sqmusu, ltudan na ppɾana kluwan anaj ʦubus. ini dħa əqɾaqun ddiju ka ʦubus nii, wana duma ita sədiq ŋalan dħa pħmaan ŋiɾaw ka sqmusu ʦubus, uxaj uɾi u ŋalan dħa mtaħu puniq.
S.FORM: = Cubus = Beyhing bay qhuni mi mtuting wasaw na ka cubus nii, sqmusu qhuni na msama mi msdhriq, wasaw na mrux kingal, kiya ka ssiyaw wasaw na niqan ini pwaya elu krtan rupung, hnytuwan so qapan bawa ka wasaw na, niqan 5 hbin, mdakil ddwiyaq. Cubus nii u mniq brah mtuting wasaw ciida, kiya ka wasaw na brah ptingan mrriyux mcays, brhibung banah mi dhuq mbanah, nduwa bay malu qtaan, kaya ka niaqn bay hangan na mbanah wasaw ka cubus nii, wada dha phmaan qqtaan da, knmalu bay phmaan qhuni, hmaan ddaun elu, phmaan kulu phpah mi phmaan dxral, saya daw, hbaraw bay ka ita sediq ngalan na pusu sqmusu, ltudan na pprana kluwan anay cubus. Ini dha eqraqun ddiyu ka cubus nii, wana duma ita sediq ngalan dha phmaan ngiraw ka sqmusu cubus, uxay uri u ngalan dha mtahu puniq.
S.PHON: = ʦubus = bəħiŋ baj qħuni mi mtutiŋ wasaw na ka ʦubus nii, sqmusu qħuni na msama mi msdħɾiq, wasaw na mɾux kiŋal, kija ka ssijaw wasaw na niqan ini pwaja əlu kɾtan ɾupuŋ, ħnjtuwan so qapan bawa ka wasaw na, niqan * ħbin, mdakil ddwijaq. ʦubus nii u mniq bɾaħ mtutiŋ wasaw ʦiida, kija ka wasaw na bɾaħ ptiŋan mɾɾijux mʦajs, bɾħibuŋ banaħ mi dħuq mbanaħ, nduwa baj malu qtaan, kaja ka niaqn baj ħaŋan na mbanaħ wasaw ka ʦubus nii, wada dħa pħmaan qqtaan da, knmalu baj pħmaan qħuni, ħmaan ddaun əlu, pħmaan kulu pħpaħ mi pħmaan dxɾal, saja daw, ħbaɾaw baj ka ita sədiq ŋalan na pusu sqmusu, ltudan na ppɾana kluwan anaj ʦubus. ini dħa əqɾaqun ddiju ka ʦubus nii, wana duma ita sədiq ŋalan dħa pħmaan ŋiɾaw ka sqmusu ʦubus, uxaj uɾi u ŋalan dħa mtaħu puniq.
